title: Drug dealer gets 14 years
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A man who was found...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A man who was found guilty of dealing in drugs, Neo Mosoeu (44), was sentenced to 14 years’ imprisonment in the Plettenberg Bay Regional Court on Tuesday 14 October.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A man who was found guilty of dealing in drugs, Neo Mosoeu (44), was sentenced to 14 years’ imprisonment in the Plettenberg Bay Regional Court on Tuesday 14 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Police are now searching for Vincent Mosoeu (36), the second accused in the case, who failed to appear in court after being released on bail."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Their arrests were the result of an operation aimed at curbing the influx of illicit drugs into the province last year.","html":"Their arrests were the result of an operation aimed at curbing the influx of illicit drugs into the province last year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Members of the Provincial Organised Crime Investigations (OCI) Narcotics unit based in George received information on 27 August 2024 that a supplier was en route to the Garden Route with a consignment of drugs,\" read a statement by Sergeant Chris Spies, the Southern Cape police spokesperson.","html":"\"Members of the Provincial Organised Crime Investigations (OCI) Narcotics unit based in George received information on 27 August 2024 that a supplier was en route to the Garden Route with a consignment of drugs,\" read a statement by Sergeant Chris Spies, the Southern Cape police spokesperson."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spies said the unit assembled a team which included Attaqua K9 and acted on the information.","html":"Spies said the unit assembled a team which included Attaqua K9 and acted on the information."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Supplier"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spies said when the members spotted the vehicle, a Chevrolet Captiva, along the N12 the following morning, they stopped it at the entrance to De Rust and searched it.","html":"Spies said when the members spotted the vehicle, a Chevrolet Captiva, along the N12 the following morning, they stopped it at the entrance to De Rust and searched it."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Neo Mosoeu was sentenced to 14 years imprisonment. Photo: Supplied","html":"Neo Mosoeu was sentenced to 14 years imprisonment. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This led to the discovery of 40 000 Mandrax tablets hidden in a compartment at the back. Police confiscated the drugs estimated at R2m and arrested the driver, Vincent Mosoeu (36), on a charge of dealing in drugs.\"","html":"\"This led to the discovery of 40 000 Mandrax tablets hidden in a compartment at the back. Police confiscated the drugs estimated at R2m and arrested the driver, Vincent Mosoeu (36), on a charge of dealing in drugs.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spies said further investigation led to the subsequent arrest of Neo Mosoeu (44), the manufacturer and supplier of the Mandrax tablets.","html":"Spies said further investigation led to the subsequent arrest of Neo Mosoeu (44), the manufacturer and supplier of the Mandrax tablets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Neo was kept in custody until his conviction. He was sentenced to 14 years imprisonment of which four years were suspended for five years, with strict conditions.","html":"Neo was kept in custody until his conviction. He was sentenced to 14 years imprisonment of which four years were suspended for five years, with strict conditions."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Search on for second accused"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The other accused, Vincent Mosoeu (36), who was released on bail, failed to make his court appearance.","html":"The other accused, Vincent Mosoeu (36), who was released on bail, failed to make his court appearance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The court issued a warrant for his arrest and a search for him is underway. Anyone with information on his whereabouts may contact Crime Stop on 08600 10111.","html":"The court issued a warrant for his arrest and a search for him is underway. Anyone with information on his whereabouts may contact Crime Stop on 08600 10111."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
